auth.loginSubtitle: Create, maintain, and export consultant CVs.
auth.loginHelp: Contact your administrator if you are unable to sign in.

assistantPreferences.pageDescription: Define your personal writing preferences so external AI clients can adapt revisions to your profile and tone.
assistantPreferences.formDescription: These preferences are injected as consultant-specific guidance in the external AI revision context. Keep them short, concrete, and focused on how you want your CV to read.
assistantPreferences.promptPlaceholder: Example: Prefer a senior, concise tone that still feels practical and hands-on.
assistantPreferences.rulesPlaceholder: Example: Emphasize architecture, leadership, and business impact when the CV supports it.
assistantPreferences.validatorsPlaceholder: Example: Avoid sounding generic, avoid buzzwords without evidence, and do not overstate my role.

externalAIConnections.pageDescription: Create and manage secure one-time connection flows for external AI clients that use the public resume revision API.
externalAIConnections.loadError: Failed to load external AI connection data.
externalAIConnections.connectionTitlePlaceholder: Optional label to help you recognise this connection
externalAIConnections.createError: Failed to create external AI connection.
externalAIConnections.empty: No external AI connections created yet.

promptInventory.pageDescription: Manage the prompt templates that drive the AI features in the system. Prompts are grouped by role in the product, not by source file.
promptInventory.manageNotice: This page shows the database-backed prompt definitions currently available in the system. Editable prompts can be updated directly here.
promptInventory.searchPlaceholder: Search by system role, prompt type, or content…
promptInventory.emptySearch: No prompt functions matched your search.

history.treeNoCommits: No snapshots on this version yet.
history.description: Each snapshot captures this resume at a point in time. Switch between versions to see their individual histories, or use the tree view for a full overview.

mergeDialog.title: Accept draft
mergeDialog.message: Choose which version to accept "{{branchName}}" into.
mergeDialog.error: Failed to accept the draft. Please try again.

deleteDialog.title: Delete version
deleteDialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{branchName}}"? This cannot be undone.
deleteDialog.error: Failed to delete the version. Please try again.

variants.createButtonDisabledTooltip: Save a snapshot on the resume page first
variants.noVersionsWarning: No saved snapshots yet. Go back to the resume and click "Save snapshot" before creating a version.

createDialog.title: Create new version
createDialog.error: Failed to create version. Please try again.
createDialog.noVersions: No saved snapshots found. Save a snapshot first.

variants.description: Versions are independent copies of this resume tailored for different roles or languages. Each version has its own edit history.

compare.noChanges: No differences between the selected snapshots.
compare.description: Select two snapshots to compare them side by side. Changes are grouped by resume fields, skills, and assignments.
compare.noSelectionHint: Select two snapshots above to see what changed between them.

tree.noBranches: No versions match the current filter

saveVersion.error: Failed to save snapshot. Please try again.

translationStaleBanner.title: Translation is out of date
translationStaleBanner.description: The source variant has new changes. Update this translation when you're ready.
translationStaleBanner.error: Failed to mark as up to date. Please try again.

revision.title: Sync draft with source
revision.step1Description: Bring in the latest changes from "{{sourceName}}" so you can accept this draft.
revision.step2Description: This creates a new snapshot on the draft carrying your changes forward.

translation.title: Sync translation with source
translation.step1Description: The source has changed. Syncing copies the latest source content into this translation — you'll need to re-translate the changed sections.
translation.step2Description: A new snapshot will be created with source content. Translated fields may need review.

revertDialog.title: Restore to earlier snapshot?
revertDialog.description: This creates a new snapshot with the content from the selected snapshot. History is preserved.
revertDialog.error: Failed to restore. Please try again.

revisionBanner.title: Draft
revisionBanner.description: This is a short-lived draft off "{{sourceName}}".

reviewDialog.title: Review & accept
reviewDialog.description: Accept this draft into "{{sourceName}}", or save it as a separate version.
reviewDialog.acceptConflictError: Cannot accept — the source has new changes. Sync with the latest source or start a new draft.
reviewDialog.acceptError: Failed to accept. Please try again.
reviewDialog.saveError: Failed to save version. Please try again.

discardDialog.title: Discard draft?
discardDialog.description: This will delete the draft permanently.
discardDialog.error: Failed to discard draft. Please try again.

aiAssistant.emptyConversation: Start the conversation by typing a message below.
aiAssistant.errorSending: Failed to send message. Please try again.
aiAssistant.errorLoading: Failed to load conversation. Please try again.
aiAssistant.errorCreating: Failed to start conversation. Please try again.
aiAssistant.conversationListEmpty: No previous conversations for this content.
aiAssistant.conversationClosedNotice: This conversation is closed. Start a new one to continue revising.
aiAssistant.analysisInProgress: AI is analysing the current content...
aiAssistant.toolsContext: {{count}} tools available for {{entityType}} in this chat session.

commands.help: Show help and examples of what this chat can help with.
commands.status: Show a short status summary for the current work queue.
commands.explain: Explain why suggestions were created and what has already been reviewed.

toolStatus.inspect_resume_sections: Reading the full editable resume content
toolStatus.mark_revision_work_item_no_changes_neede: No changes needed for this item
toolStatus.set_revision_plan: Resume inspected, plan ready for review

revision.createError: Failed to create revision workflow. Please try again.
revision.startDescription: Let AI help you revise your resume section by section. You stay in control — review, discuss, and approve each change.

inline.checklistDescription: The checklist will appear here after AI understands your goal and starts a revision branch.
inline.checklistWaitingDescription: Tell AI what you want to change. Once the direction is clear, suggested tasks will appear here.
inline.intentStatusDescription: The first step is to clarify what should change in the resume and what should stay intact.
inline.branchStatusDescription: This mode is already scoped to the current resume branch so planned work stays isolated.
inline.diffStatusDescription: Use the links below to inspect earlier saved versions while planning the revision.
inline.chatDescription: Discuss the full resume here while staying inside the editor.
inline.chatActionContext: Plan from: {{sourceBranchName}}. Now working in branch: {{branchName}}
inline.initialPrompt: What would you like to change in this resume?
inline.chatHint: Start with the change you want. The same revision chat can handle several follow-up requests over time.
inline.exampleSpelling: Fix spelling and language issues across the whole resume.
inline.exampleTone: Make the tone more senior and professional without making it less concrete.
inline.exampleFocus: Emphasise technical leadership, architecture, and embedded AI experience.
inline.inputPlaceholder: Describe the revision you want to make…

documentTitle.planning: Review the current resume while planning the revision
documentTitle.actions: Review the resume while AI proposes actions
documentTitle.finalize: Review the resume before finalizing the action step

documentDescription.planning: The document stays visible and editable here, but the checklist is still waiting for the AI discovery step to define the actual work.
documentDescription.actions: Use the document as reference while reviewing the concrete actions that AI proposes from the agreed plan.
documentDescription.finalize: This step summarizes which actions should move forward once the execution phase is implemented.

inline.finalizeDescription: {{accepted}} accepted out of {{reviewed}} reviewed suggestions. There are {{total}} suggestions in this revision session.
inline.suggestionsDescription: Review the concrete suggestions that AI generates in this revision chat here.
inline.suggestionsWaitingDescription: Waiting for AI to generate concrete suggestions for this revision request.
inline.diffHint: You will be able to open the diff from this panel.

conversation.readOnly: This step is approved — viewing read-only.
conversation.pendingInfo: Send a message to start the AI conversation for this step.

diffPanel.noProposal: No proposal yet. Start the conversation to get an AI proposal.
diffPanel.pendingDiscovery: Complete the discovery conversation to see your goals here.

finalReview.title: All steps approved
finalReview.subtitle: Choose how to apply the draft to your resume.
finalReview.mergeDescription: All draft snapshots will be applied to your base version. The original is preserved in history.
finalReview.keepDescription: The draft stays as a separate version. You can accept it later.

oauthAuthorize.title: Authorize access
oauthAuthorize.subtitle: {{client}} is requesting permission to access your CV data.
oauthAuthorize.approveError: Failed to create the authorization. Please try again.
oauthAuthorize.errorMissingPkce: Invalid OAuth2 request: PKCE code_challenge is required.
oauthAuthorize.errorUnknownClient: Unknown client: {{clientId}}. The client may be inactive or not registered.
